new_probe.reason: No fresh independent bounded validation-only axis survived the strict-gate, closed-family, and quarantine/public-negative review; launching would repeat weak/stalled/prohibited families or rely on public-negative boundary/frontier variants.

best_or_top_metrics.note: The apparent internal strict metric belongs to capacity/frontier/boundary scoreblend family already submitted with negative public transfer and quarantined; it is not a valid fresh axis.

direct_searches: rg over reports/scripts/state for strict gates, deltas, p-values, quarantine, public-negative, and closed-axis terms
rg over reports/artifacts for metric verdict evidence including STRICT_PASS/WEAK_SIGNAL/REJECT/mean_delta/positive_splits/pooled_p_exact
rg over scripts for axis/probe/gate families and artifact-producing surfaces
ast-grep for Python subprocess.run call sites
ps process sweep for Kaggle submit/probe/controller activity

closed_or_rejected_axes_checked.evidence: Fine-grid reports still absent with repeated invalid-divide warnings; prior smoke mean delta +0.000900 and p=0.05415 fail strict mean and p gates.
Smoke top mean delta +0.0003667, min delta -0.0012002, 2/3 positive, p=0.3388; expanded probe reports absent.

Some internal rows in reports/20260603T164750KST_boundary_factory_frontier.json clear mean/p gates, but state/aggressive_quota_runner_state.json records boundary_scoreblend and frontier_z public deltas -0.0007 to -0.0025 and quarantines those families.
Submitted variants with validation mean deltas around +0.0013 to +0.0014 scored below public best; family and siblings are skipped/quarantined.

closed_or_rejected_axes_checked.axis: Layer mixture, SL@K-lite, multi-interest SVD, SASRec/xSIMGCL/semantic/text/README/LM, temporal/hours/exact-K/last-slot/DNS
closed_or_rejected_axes_checked.evidence: Recent reports/artifact summaries mark these weak, split-inconsistent, below floor, redundant, public-noise risk, or explicitly closed in the prompt.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Predeclared non-boundary, non-residual diagnostic of validation-label-free model disagreement
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: All currently implemented disagreement surfaces overlap jackknife, boundary, frontier/capacity, or layer-mixture families that are closed, weak, or quarantined; a materially new implementation is not present in this repo pass.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Repair UserKNN finite-value computation as engineering hygiene only
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: It would address warnings but not constitute a fresh independent improvement axis, and the UserKNN family is explicitly stalled/closed without metric-report evidence.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: New base model family trained from scratch
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_not_launched_now: Existing implemented alternatives are rejected or below floor, while a new train-from-scratch family would exceed this bounded validation-only iteration and risks weak one-split evidence.
